intro: A few days later Marta asks Preben why he spends so much time in Spain. He explains his connection to Albir - the flat, the beach, the gym, the football, and how he pays for it all.

messages.speaker: marta
messages.es: Preben, por que vienes tanto a España?
messages.en: Preben, why do you come to Spain so much?

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Mi familia tiene un apartamento en Albir.
messages.en: My family has an apartment in Albir.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Lo compramos hace catorce años.
messages.en: We bought it 14 years ago.

messages.speaker: marta
messages.es: Que bien! Vienes mucho?
messages.en: How nice! Do you come a lot?

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: He estado aqui casi treinta veces. Me encanta este lugar.
messages.en: I've been here almost 30 times. I love this place.

messages.speaker: marta
messages.es: Que te gusta de Albir?
messages.en: What do you like about Albir?

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Paso mucho tiempo en la playa.
messages.en: I spend a lot of time on the beach.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Tambien voy al gimnasio en Albir. Se llama FlexFit.
messages.en: I also go to the gym in Albir. It's called FlexFit.

messages.speaker: marta
messages.es: Como es el gimnasio?
messages.en: What's the gym like?

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: El equipo es viejo, pero funciona bien.
messages.en: The equipment is old, but it works fine.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Y cuando veo el Mundial, voy a Kasbrane. Me encanta!
messages.en: And when I watch the World Cup, I go to Kasbrane. I love it!

messages.speaker: marta
messages.es: Genial! Y que mas te gusta?
messages.en: Awesome! And what else do you like?

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Me gusta tomar algo en la Plaza de Altea.
messages.en: I like to have a drink at the Altea Plaza.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Tambien me gustan los bares y los restaurantes.
messages.en: I also like the bars and the restaurants.

messages.speaker: marta
messages.es: Que planes tienes para mañana?
messages.en: What plans do you have for tomorrow?

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Tengo que ir a La Marina. Necesito ropa nueva.
messages.en: I have to go to La Marina. I need new clothes.

messages.speaker: marta
messages.es: Y tu apartamento en Bergen?
messages.en: And your apartment in Bergen?

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Cuando estoy aqui, alquilo mi apartamento en Bergen.
messages.en: When I'm here, I rent out my apartment in Bergen.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Gano algo de dinero con Airbnb.
messages.en: I earn some money with Airbnb.

messages.speaker: marta
messages.es: Que buena idea! Salud!
messages.en: What a good idea! Cheers!

questions.prompt: Why does Preben come to Spain so often?
options: His family has an apartment in Albir

questions.prompt: Preben has been to Albir almost 30 times.
Where does Preben go to watch the World Cup?

questions.quote: El equipo es viejo, pero funciona bien.

items: His family has an apartment in Albir
He talks about the beach, the gym and the football
He plans to go shopping at La Marina
He rents out his Bergen flat on Airbnb
